name: 少女侦探白猫 Girl Detective White Cat
short_description: White Cat and her assistant Shadow, who have just established a detective agency, have received their first commission to explore and solve the case in the city based on clues!
detailed_description:
Game Introduction:

You will play the role of a novice detective named White Cat who has just established a detective agency. Together with her assistant Shadow, they embark on an exploration of the city to solve their first mission and uncover the truth behind the case, only to become embroiled in a major event.

Game features:

  • Not a serious detective game, the experience is relatively mild

  • As the process progresses, there will be different gameplay

  • There are action and combat parts

  • Explore and collect information, integrate logic to obtain new clues

  • Easy plot and atmosphere

  • Build a city scene rich in life atmosphere with various street elements
